title: MagicCraft
description: Welcome to MagicCraft, the official 1.20.1 Forge modpack Dive into a true fantasy experience where magic reigns supreme. This pack features the colossal creatures of Ice and Fire, a complete and highly customizable spell system, and extensive exploration
body:
#  **Adventure and Magic on FantasyCRAFT**

Welcome to the official and unique Modpack created exclusively for the a fantasy adventure 
! ! ! !      

This modpack is designed to deliver a survival experience focused on Epic **Fantasy, Exploration, and, of course, Magic**. Get ready to face mighty dragons and discover legendary artifacts,Dive into a truly fantastic experience where magic abounds! This modpack is packed with diverse mods and features, inviting you to explore every corner of the world and discover its magical changes

## **Mods used**

- **Ice and Fire** 🐉: Adds a wide variety of mythical creatures like dragons, hippogryphs, and sirens, making exploration a dangerous and rewarding adventure Credits to [AlexModGuy ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/AlexModGuy) [TheBv ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/TheBv) [ron0 ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/ron0)

- **Ars Nouveau** : A complete and highly customizable magic system that allows you to create your own personalized spells Credits to [baileyholl ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/baileyholl)

- **CuriousAPI** : is a non-content library mod (API) that extends the player's inventory by adding new equipment slots (such as rings, amulets, and belts). It is a mandatory dependency for any accessory or equipment mod that utilizes these extra slots. [TheIllusiveC4 ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/TheIllusiveC4)

- **geckolib** : It is a mandatory dependency required by many popular mods to implement complex, detailed, and smooth animations for blocks, items, and especially custom entities (like the dragons in Ice and Fire). It is not a content mod and only provides the framework for other mods' animations to work correctly. [Geckolib Page ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/4.8.2)

- **Just Enough Item (JEI)** : JEI provides a clean, searchable interface that displays every item and block available in the game, including those added by mods.

  **Key Functionality**
Recipe Viewer: Allows players to easily view the crafting recipe for any item (by pressing R), as well as what items an ingredient is used to create (by pressing U).

  **Item Search** Features a highly efficient search bar, allowing quick location of any item, block, or ingredient added by the modpack.

  **Cheating Mode (Optional)** When permissions allow, JEI can enable a creative mode-like function to quickly acquire items for testing purposes. Credits [mezz ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/mezz)

- **patchouli** : Patchouli is a library mod that acts as a flexible framework for creating in-game documentation and guidebooks. It is not a content mod itself It is a required dependency for many magic and adventure mods[Vazkii ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/Vazkii) [williewillus ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/williewillus) [Minecraftschurli ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/Minecraftschurli)

- **Citadel** : Citadel is a specialized, open-source API (Application Programming Interface) primarily designed to introduce advanced features for new entity models and animations into Minecraft. [AlexModGuy ♥ ](https://modrinth.com/user/AlexModGuy)
  
 ## **Minimal Things**

 **- VersionMC**
 1.20.1

 **- ModLoader**
 [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html)
